title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.705 - Program coordinators, appointment, duties — compensation
text:
192.705.  Program coordinators, appointment, duties — compensation. — The director shall appoint an arthritis program coordinator to administer the state arthritis program.  Compensation for this position shall be set by the director within the limit of the appropriation for that purpose.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1028 § 3)
